prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily adjusted closing prices for ACN over the last 2 years were used to calculate daily log returns. From these, the mean daily log return (representing the drift) and the daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns) were estimated. These parameters were then used to project the stock price forward 21 trading days, assuming that prices follow a log-normal distribution. The point estimate represents the median expected price, and the confidence intervals are calculated using the Z-scores corresponding to the specified confidence levels (50%, 80%, 90%) and the projected volatility over the 21-day period based on the GBM model.
